query:
SELECT 
  'paymentDate NULL' as type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM orders WHERE paymentDate IS NULL AND status != 'cancelled'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'paymentDate NOT NULL' as type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM orders WHERE paymentDate IS NOT NULL AND status != 'cancelled'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'classDate NULL' as type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM orders WHERE classDate IS NULL AND status != 'cancelled'
UNION ALL
SELECT 
  'classDate NOT NULL' as type,
  COUNT(*) as count
FROM orders WHERE classDate IS NOT NULL AND status != 'cancelled';
